title: Garnotia conduplicata
taxonomy: Garnotia conduplicata is a species of plant in the family Poaceae. It is classified as a type of grass, specifically belonging to the genus Garnotia. The plant is native to Asia and is found in various countries, including China, India, and Southeast Asia. Garnotia conduplicata is a part of the larger grass family, Poaceae, which includes many other species of grasses and related plants. This classification helps to group plants with similar characteristics and evolutionary relationships.
